name: CTF Bench
tagline: Benchmark for AIs and humans solving novel CTF-style challenges
description: CTF Bench hosts original, non-web-indexed practice challenges and a first-solve leaderboard. Challenge text and attachments are public; answers (flags) are never stored in git. The backend verifies submissions using an HMAC-based check against a secret pepper and per-challenge expected digests.

env_vars.description: Secret key used to HMAC submitted flags (required). Keep this private; do not commit it.
JSON object mapping challenge_id -> expected HMAC hex digest (recommended). If unset, the app can read from CTFBENCH_FLAG_HMACS_PATH.
Path to a JSON file mapping challenge_id -> expected HMAC hex digest (e.g. /app/data/ctfbench_flag_hmacs.json).
